summary: Faz B + Faz C + RBAC verification complete. All source_policy enforcement working correctly. No silent fallbacks - deterministic error states implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>, <select>, <tbody>, <tr>. Minor console warning, not functional issue.

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in AdminContentList.js - dynamic span wrappers inside select/table elements causing console warnings. Not blocking but should be cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Faz B/C source_policy gates verified. RBAC for dealer/user on admin content endpoints working (403). Home page loads with published layout at /tr. SearchPage shows deterministic empty state at /tr/kategori/autos (409 status from backend indicating no published revision). Admin Content List loads correctly after login.
